feed.title: Journal of Politeness Research...
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Journal of Politeness Research... (De Gruyter)

entry.title: What pronouns do you use? The pronoun-sharing practice from an (im)politeness perspective
entry.summary: Authors: Sandrine Sorlin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pr-2024-0057 Pages: Page range: 1-24

entry.title: Well-wishing practices in Greek and English food blogs
entry.summary: Authors: Angeliki Tzanne, Maria Sifianou DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pr-2025-0006 Pages: Page range: 25-51

entry.title: (Im)politeness in the face of digital rejection: an analysis of whether gender affects the response to an impolite refusal of a Facebook friend request
entry.summary: Authors: Mohammed H. Almalki DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pr-2023-0024 Pages: Page range: 53-78

entry.title: Force dynamics of (im)politeness: evidence from (im)politeness of Chinese parent–child discourse in family mealtimes
entry.summary: Authors: Linlin Zhan, Shanshan Yu, Xiaoming Shang, You Li DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pr-2024-0058 Pages: Page range: 79-102

entry.title: Beyond mock politeness: sarcastic interrogatives as tools for face-threatening acts
entry.summary: Authors: Efrat Levant, Einat Kuzai, Cameron Morin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pr-2024-0056 Pages: Page range: 103-131

entry.title: Comedy out of tragedy: impoliteness as a ritual of entertainment
entry.summary: Authors: Najah Zainal Abidin DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pr-2023-0047 Pages: Page range: 133-157

entry.title: A closer look at explanations in refusals: themes, attributions, and contexts
entry.summary: Authors: Xianming Fang, Jie Zhao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pr-2025-0046 Pages: Page range: 159-187

entry.title: “Your letter is a deplorable specimen of bad writing”: criticism and authority in responses to reader letters inThe Girl’s Own Paper, 1880
entry.summary: Authors: Jessica Marsh DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pr-2025-0005 Pages: Page range: 189-214

entry.title: Gerrard Mugford. 2023. Towards a new pedagogy for teaching ForeignLanguage politeness: Halliday’s model and approaches to politeness
entry.summary: Authors: Wenfeng Wang DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pr-2024-0027 Pages: Page range: 215-219

entry.title: Metapragmatics of attentiveness: a study in interpersonal and cross-cultural pragmatics
entry.summary: Authors: Bingyun Li, Chaoqun Xie DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pr-2025-0034 Pages: Page range: 221-226
